title: Live updates: ZachXBT calls hardware wallets complete garbage; BTC steady after Korea rate hike
summary: Blockchain investigator ZachXBT came down heavily on hardware wallets. BTC traded steady near $65,000 after South Korea's rate hike.

title: U.S. Senate unanimously opposes clemency for FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried
summary: The nonbinding resolution passed without objection after Bankman-Fried asked for clemency, months after Trump pardoned other major crypto figures, including Changpeng Zhao and Ross Ulbricht.

title: A bitcoin wallet dormant since the 2017 peak just moved $383 million
summary: The coins went to a fresh address rather than an exchange, so nothing has been sold yet.

title: Ether outruns bitcoin as ETF money returns, almost all of from BlackRock's fund
summary: This is not a broad rally as bitcoin is up 4% over the same stretch, and solana, TRON and hyperliquid are all lower.

title: Two groups of bitcoin investors sell on the rise as U.S. inflation lifts prices to nearly $65,000
summary: Bitcoin surges toward $65,000 on softer-than-expected inflation data, but on-chain signals show two key investor groups selling into the bounce.
